goal: Wave 17.6 — Emergency Card View Restoration + Bug Fixes
summary: Emergency card view restored with redesigned components. Discovered and fixed 3 critical bugs during review cycle: (1) vite.config.js referenced deleted legacy views → Vercel preview failed, (2) EmergencyRedesign.jsx had TDZ ReferenceError from useEffect calling handler before declaration → white screen at runtime, (3) Settings.jsx had unused variable from deleted toggle code. All fixes applied in 4 commits.
lessons_learned: R-010 (hook order) is CRITICAL — not just style, causes runtime TDZ crash
Static analysis cannot detect useEffect→handler TDZ; must test locally
Local quality gates MUST run before push: 18 seconds prevents 30min wasted review
DEVFLOW reviewing without runtime testing missed TDZ bug
new_aps_created: AP-094: Reference handler in useEffect before declaration
AP-095: Skip local quality gates before push
next: Await Gemini Code Assist re-review, then merge PR #452
